MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Steven Joseph of the law offices of Nelson Mullins Riley & Scarborough (424-221-7400) appears as applicant counsel for defendant, Kimberly Ahlheim

No other appearance is made in this matter

ATTORNEYS NELSON MULLINS RILEY & SCARBOROUGH'S MOTION TO ADMIT PRO HAC VICE Attorney Steven Joseph as counsel for defendant Kimberly Ahlheim is GRANTED. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Defendants Crate & Barrel, Douglas Diemoz'S Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Continued To Aug-31-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael D. Weil, Esq. and Johanna Jacob, Esq. of Orrick Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP, Tel.415.773.5794 for defendant and moving party Crate & Barrel and Douglas Diemoz;
Nathan B. Sabri, Esq. of Morrison Foerster, Tel. 415.268.6641, for plaintiff;
Bret Cohen, Esq. of Mintz Levin Cohn Ferris Glovsky & Popeo PC, Tel. 617.542.6000, for defendant Kimberly Ahlheim, by court call.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the parties were ordered to meet and confer and the Court continues the hearing on DEFENDANTS CRATE & BARREL, DOUGLAS DIEMOZ'S Motion For Protective Order to August 31, 2017. In addition, the Court on its own motion adds to the calendar a Motion For Appointment Of Referee to be heard on the same date. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Gordon F. Aiavao, CSR # 11216, email: gaiavao@sftc.org.
